$comment: Public source links for the Rust-language benchmark slice used by eval-ladder. The production mirror we ingest is Multi-SWE-Bench's Rust split on Hugging Face (239 tasks); it is publicly licensed and derived from real upstream Rust PRs. Prior releases referenced a placeholder URL that has since 404'd; the authoritative source is now the HF dataset below.

sources.name: Multi-SWE-Bench: A Multilingual Benchmark for Issue Resolving
